evals.prompt: Implement Task 0.1 from the bookmarks plan - create TypeScript types and Zod schemas
evals.expected_output: Two files created: apps/learn-app/src/types/bookmarks.ts with Bookmark and BookmarksState interfaces, and apps/learn-app/src/utils/bookmarks/validation.ts with BookmarkSchema and BookmarksStateSchema Zod schemas
expectations: Bookmark interface has all required fields (id, createdAt, lessonSlug, chapterId, sectionId, sectionTitle, contentPreview, etc.)
Zod schemas include regex validation for ID formats
Types compile with no TypeScript errors

evals.prompt: Implement Task 0.2 - create localStorage adapter with cloud-sync abstraction
evals.expected_output: Two files: storage.ts with loadBookmarks/saveBookmarks/clearBookmarks functions, and storage-adapter.ts with BookmarkStorageAdapter interface and LocalStorageAdapter class
expectations: BookmarkStorageAdapter interface defines load(), save(), and optional sync() methods
loadBookmarks handles empty state and corrupted JSON gracefully
saveBookmarks validates with Zod before saving

evals.expected_output: Hook file at apps/learn-app/src/hooks/useBookmarks.ts that follows useFSRS pattern with load on mount, save on change, and returns queries + mutations
expectations: Hook loads from localStorage on mount
Hook saves to localStorage on change
Uses adapter pattern (not direct localStorage calls)

evals.expected_output: Component at apps/learn-app/src/components/bookmarks/BookmarkDock.tsx with CSS module, following VoiceControlDock pattern
expectations: Uses BrowserOnly wrapper for SSR safety

evals.prompt: Implement Task 1.2 - create BookmarkPanel component with slide-out animation
evals.expected_output: Panel component with focus trap, Escape key close, and accessibility features
Page component at apps/learn-app/src/pages/bookmarks.tsx showing all bookmarks grouped by chapter
expectations: Shows empty state when no bookmarks

evals.prompt: Implement Task 3.1 - integrate BookmarkDock into Docusaurus theme
evals.expected_output: Modified Layout component that includes BookmarkDock with BrowserOnly wrapper
expectations: Dock appears on all doc pages
